text.title: Asset Harvest Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated asset-harvest-checklist artefact.

step.name: enumerate
step.action: Walk through 5 categories; add baseline items per category.

step.name: assign-source
step.action: Replace placeholders with concrete URL / file / script.

step.name: flag-required
step.action: Mark required_by_launch=true for og-image, favicon, privacy link, analytics consent gate, canonical URL.

step.name: status-walk
step.action: Walk each item; flip status to done / in-progress / missing.

step.name: launch-gate
step.action: Block launch if any required_by_launch=true item is status=missing.
